prompt: Create a cinematic dark fantasy concept-art scene in a dense ancient jungle ruin. A colossal dragon-wolf chimera dominates the frame, crouched low and prowling from left to right, with a snarling reptilian dragon head, glowing green eyes, sharp teeth, twisted black horns, a long scaled tail, huge clawed forelegs, and layered emerald-black armor-like scales. Give the creature a wild mane of long silver-white hair flowing over its head, neck, shoulders, and back, with jagged dorsal spines and thorn-like spikes along its limbs and tail. Set it among mossy stone ruins, broken pillars, tangled roots, hanging vines, wet forest floor, small candle-like glows, and teal mist. Use dramatic sunbeams breaking through the high canopy, volumetric fog, backlighting, rim light on the fur and scales, deep shadows, rich green and turquoise color grading, highly detailed textures, epic scale, ultra-realistic fantasy illustration, wide landscape composition, no text, no watermark.
